mapper.sql: id, variable_id AS variableId, element_id AS elementId, element_name AS elementName, collection_name AS collectionName, sign_type AS signType, remark, is_del AS isDel, create_user AS createUser, create_time AS createTime, update_user AS updateUser, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select: SELECT a.*,c.undertake_status AS undertakeStatus FROM t_bpm_variable_multiplayer a LEFT JOIN t_bpm_variable b ON a.variable_id = b.id LEFT JOIN t_bpm_variable_multiplayer_personnel c ON a.id = c.variable_multiplayer_id WHERE a.element_id = #{elementId} AND b.process_num = #{processNum}

select tbvm.collection_name as variablename from t_bpm_variable tbv inner join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer tbvm on tbvm.variable_id=tbv.id where tbv.process_num=#{processNum} and tbvm.element_id=#{elementId}

select tbvmp.assignee as id, tbvmp.assignee_name as name from t_bpm_variable tbv left join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer tbvm on tbvm.variable_id=tbv.id left join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer_personnel tbvmp on tbvmp.variable_multiplayer_id=tbvm.id where tbv.process_num=#{processNum} and tbvm.element_id=#{elementId} and tbvmp.assignee_name is not null

select tbvmp.assignee as id, tbvmp.assignee_name as name from t_bpm_variable tbv left join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer tbvm on tbvm.variable_id=tbv.id left join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer_personnel tbvmp on tbvmp.variable_multiplayer_id=tbvm.id where tbv.process_num=#{processNum} and tbvm.node_id=#{nodeId} and tbvmp.assignee_name is not null
select tbvm.node_id from t_bpm_variable tbv inner join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer tbvm on tbvm.variable_id=tbv.id where tbv.process_num=#{processNum} and tbvm.element_id=#{elementId}
select tbvm.element_id from t_bpm_variable tbv inner join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer tbvm on tbvm.variable_id=tbv.id where tbv.process_num=#{processNum} and tbvm.node_id=#{nodeId}

select tbvmp.assignee as id, tbvmp.assignee_name as name, tbvm.collection_name as varName, tbvmp.id as variableId from t_bpm_variable tbv left join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer tbvm on tbvm.variable_id=tbv.id left join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer_personnel tbvmp on tbvmp.variable_multiplayer_id=tbvm.id where tbv.process_num=#{processNum} and tbvm.element_id=#{elementId} and tbvmp.assignee_name is not null

select tbvmp.assignee as id, tbvmp.assignee_name as name, tbvm.collection_name as varName, tbvmp.id as variableId, tbvm.element_id from t_bpm_variable tbv left join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer tbvm on tbvm.variable_id=tbv.id left join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer_personnel tbvmp on tbvmp.variable_multiplayer_id=tbvm.id where tbv.process_num=#{processNum} and tbvm.node_id=#{nodeId} and tbvmp.assignee_name is not null

select tbvm.node_id as nodeId, tbvm.element_id as elementId from t_bpm_variable tbv inner join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer tbvm on tbvm.variable_id=tbv.id where tbv.process_num=#{processNum} and tbvm.element_id in
#{item}

select tbn.* from t_bpm_variable tbv inner join t_bpm_variable_multiplayer tbvm on tbvm.variable_id=tbv.id inner join t_bpmn_node tbn on tbn.id=tbvm.node_id where tbv.bpmn_code=#{bpmnCode} and tbvm.element_id=#{elementId}
